title: Lead Frontend Developer at Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Lead Frontend Developer at Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Agra office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates:
Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates!
